task: I need a short, no-nonsense reply I can send about a billing mismatch on an order. Keep it plain and tight, and leave a blank where I can drop in the exact amount or reference number.

turns.agent_response:
Here’s a short version you can send:

**There is a billing mismatch on order [____]. Please correct the invoice to match the order details and resend. I will hold payment until this is resolved.**

If you want, I can make it firmer or more neutral.

user_simulator.text:
Close, but make it tighter and less wordy.

There’s a billing mismatch on order [____]. Please correct the invoice and resend it. I’ll hold payment until it matches.

If you want, give me a firmer version too.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a tighter version:

**Billing mismatch on order [____]. Please correct and resend the invoice. I’ll hold payment until it matches.**

If you want, I can make it firmer.
